subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Londolola lufunjisho luji mu biñambwañambwa byo lupana bukwasho kuubafunda.
topics: Mutwe – kache 2: Kulumbulula bingila musango wa biñambwañambwa.
Kamina: Mutwe waimena pa kumvwisha, kupima-pima buneme bwa biñambwañambwa byo
bipana lufunjisho, munema wa kisemwa ne kisho.
